title: Michael Lapke
text:
Faculty directory observation
Name: Michael Lapke
Snapshot: 2026-07-21

confidence.rationale: Proposed from an explicit normalized Knowledge Object field.

published_college: College of Natural and Behavioral Sciences

organizational_affiliations.label: College of Natural and Behavioral Sciences

education_entries: Ph D in Information Systems, Virginia Commonwealth University
MS in Computer and Information Science, University of North Florida
BS in Computer and Information Science, University of North Florida
research_interests: My primary research area is in Information Systems Security, specifically IS Security Policy Formulation and Implementation. I also do research in Healthcare IT, IT audit, and pedagogy in IS security.
teaching_interests: Cybersecurity, Programming, Analysis and Design, Database, Policy
publications: Journal Article, Academic Journal (2024). Envisioning Organizational IoT: Embracing Design Science to Address IoT Vulnerabilities . Journal of Information Systems Security. Volume, 19. Issue, 3.

Grants and Sponsored Research: Mohammad Almalag, Michael Lapke, Christopher Kreider, Leigh Armistead, "Navigating Cybersecurity Compliance Challenges for the Maritime Industry in Southeast Virginia," Sponsored by The Coastal Virginia Center of Cyber Innovation (COVA CCI)
Michael Lapke, "Assessing Voters’ Attitudes Towards Security in Election Systems: Collecting Data Across the United States," Sponsored by Christopher Newport University

Michael Lapke, Christopher Kreider, Nazli Siasi, "Enhancing Secured Cybersecurity Infrastructure for Cybersecurity Students in an Interdisciplinary Department," Sponsored by Coastal Virginia Center of Cyber Innovation
